channel.title: git on Adam Blog
channel.description: Recent content in git on Adam Blog

item.title: About
item.description: 你好，我是Adam Weng 目前就职于 Nokia 我的工程领域兴趣：Web开发（React, Node, TypeScript）、可视化 我的科研领域兴趣：3D Face Reconstruction, Machine Learning Hi, My name is Adam Weng I’m working for Nokia My engineer interesting is: Web develop（React, Node, TypeScript）, Visualization My research interesting is: 3D Face Reconstruction, Machine Learning
